name: Tremor
description: React components for building dashboards and data visualizations with Tailwind CSS

description.value: React components for building dashboards and data visualizations with Tailwind CSS
description.comment: Specialized for dashboard and chart UIs, built on Recharts and Radix UI

repository.comment: Main npm package repo; also has tremor.so components repo at github.com/tremorlabs/tremor

styling-approach.comment: Built on Tailwind CSS v4.0+; uses tailwind-variants for styling

component-model.comment: Pre-styled components with beautiful defaults; also offers copy-and-paste approach

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with Next.js; documented installation guide for Next.js projects

rsc-compatible.comment: Components are interactive and require 'use client' directive; built on Radix UI which needs client-side rendering

design-system.comment: Custom design system optimized for dashboards and data visualization

dark-mode.comment: Light and dark mode support by default in all blocks and templates

theming-system.comment: Customizable via Tailwind CSS configuration; components use CSS variables

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties for theming via Tailwind CSS

design-tokens.comment: Tailwind-based design tokens configurable via tailwind.config.js

rtl-support.comment: No explicit RTL documentation found; inherits Radix UI's RTL handling for some components

component-count.comment: 35+ components including visualizations, inputs, and UI components

select.comment: Select and Select Native components available

combobox.comment: No dedicated combobox component; Select provides basic dropdown functionality

radio.comment: Radio Group and Radio Card Group components available

number-input.comment: No dedicated number input with increment/decrement; use standard Input with type='number'

date-picker.comment: Date Picker component with calendar-based selection

date-range-picker.comment: Date Range Picker component for selecting start and end dates

file-upload.comment: File upload available in Tremor Blocks but not as standalone component

dropzone.comment: File upload with drag-drop in Blocks but not standalone component

input-groups.comment: No dedicated input groups component; can compose with Tailwind utilities

input-with-dropdown.comment: No combined input with dropdown component

button-groups.comment: No button groups component; individual Button component available

data-table.comment: Advanced tables with actions/pagination in Blocks, not as separate component with sorting/filtering

list-view.comment: No dedicated list component; Bar List for data visualization

card.comment: Card component available for content containers

timeline.comment: No timeline component; Tracker shows status over time but different purpose

calendar.comment: Calendar component available (used with Date Picker)

progress-bar.comment: Progress Bar component available; also Category Bar for multi-segment progress

empty-state.comment: Empty states available in Tremor Blocks but not standalone component

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component with focus management, built on Radix UI

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component available for slide-in panels

context-menu.comment: No right-click context menu component documented

pagination.comment: Pagination in table Blocks but not standalone component

stepper.comment: No stepper component documented; Tracker has different purpose

navigation-menu.comment: No navigation menu component; TabNavigation for tab-style navigation

sidebar.comment: Sidebar available in Page Shell Blocks but not standalone component

bottom-navigation.comment: No bottom navigation component; focused on desktop dashboards

grid.comment: No grid layout component; use Tailwind CSS grid utilities

stack.comment: No stack component; use Tailwind CSS flex utilities

container.comment: No container component; use Tailwind CSS container class

aspect-ratio.comment: No aspect ratio component; use Tailwind CSS aspect utilities

chart-libraries.comment: Built on Recharts; provides Area, Line, Bar, Donut, Combo, Spark charts with Tremor styling

form-libraries.comment: No official form library integration; standard React form patterns

animation-libraries.comment: Built-in CSS animations for dialogs, drawers, accordions via Tailwind keyframes

icon-libraries.comment: Uses Remix Icon library (@remixicon/react) as required dependency

date-libraries.comment: No documented date library dependency; date picker uses native Date

aria-compliant.comment: Built on Radix UI primitives which follow WAI-ARIA patterns

keyboard-navigation.comment: Inherits keyboard navigation from Radix UI; filter components have keyboard support

screen-reader-tested.comment: No explicit screen reader testing documented; relies on Radix UI accessibility

focus-management.comment: focusRing utilities included; Dialog inherits Radix UI focus management

wcag-level.comment: No explicit WCAG compliance level documented

accessibility-rating.comment: Adequate - Built on Radix UI primitives for core accessibility, ARIA-compliant via Radix, keyboard navigation inherited, but no explicit WCAG compliance or screen reader testing documented

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle includes Recharts and Radix dependencies; tree-shakeable so full size not representative

bundle-size-core.comment: Tree-shakeable architecture; bundle size depends on imported components

tree-shakeable.comment: Components can be imported individually; modern ESM build

zero-runtime.comment: Runtime JavaScript required for interactive components and Recharts

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be dynamically imported on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good - Comprehensive component docs, interactive examples, installation guides for Next.js/Vite, 300+ blocks with examples

interactive-docs.comment: Live component examples and copy-paste code in documentation

figma-kit.comment: Figma UI Kit available with all components and styles

cli-generator.comment: No CLI tool; uses copy-paste or npm install approach

active-maintenance.comment: Active development; v3.18.7 released January 2025; 358 total releases; 61+ contributors

commercial-support.comment: Open source under Apache 2.0; acquired by Vercel but no paid enterprise tier

style-override.comment: Tailwind CSS classes for styling; CSS variables via Tailwind config

compound-components.comment: Compound component pattern used (e.g., Dialog.Title, Accordion.Item)

render-props.comment: Tooltip customization via callbacks; onValueChange for chart interactions

slots.comment: React library; uses composition with compound components instead of slots

unstyled-mode.comment: Styled library focused on dashboards; not designed for unstyled usage
